overview.genre: Educational documentary with narrative mystery-solving structure
overview.core_approach: Progressive revelation that transforms mundane perception into extraordinary discovery
overview.defining_characteristic: Takes seemingly ordinary subject and systematically reveals hidden complexity through escalating wonder

narrative_structure.opening: Personal assumption challenge - 'I thought X was simple/normal, but...'
narrative_structure.rhythm: Wave pattern of facts building to conceptual breakthroughs
narrative_structure.closure: Philosophical elevation - connects specific subject to universal questions
key_beats: First surprising discovery that hooks deeper investigation

hook_style.pattern: Present common perception → immediate contradiction → promise of mind-changing depth
hook_style.promise: Everything you think you know is incomplete

pacing.sentence_rhythm: Variable - alternates between punchy revelations and flowing explanations
pacing.information_density: High but digestible through strategic breaks
pacing.momentum_technique: Each fact creates appetite for next deeper layer

sentence_style.variety: Deliberately mixed for rhythm and emphasis
sentence_style.fragment_usage: Strategic - for dramatic emphasis or conversational realism
examples_of_patterns: Casual observation. Technical depth. Return to accessible wonder.

primary_tools: Comparative frameworks (stronger than X, older than Y)
Scale reframing (making tiny seem massive, ancient seem present)
signature_phrases: 'This is where things get genuinely strange'
rhetorical_devices.repetition_strategy: Callback to opening assumptions to measure journey traveled
rhetorical_devices.suspense_building: Open loops through questions answered 2-3 segments later

information_architecture.layering_principle: Each fact builds on previous while opening new questions
information_architecture.complexity_scaling: Gradual - starts accessible, reaches technical, returns to philosophical
information_architecture.source_integration: Facts presented with authority but specific studies mentioned sparingly
information_architecture.technical_terminology: Introduced with immediate clarification or context

point_of_view.authority_positioning: Earned through research journey, not assumed expertise
point_of_view.vulnerability: Openly admits prior ignorance and ongoing surprise

audience_engagement.knowledge_baseline: Common cultural knowledge, no specialist background required
audience_engagement.challenge_technique: Questions what viewer thinks they know without insulting

transition_phrases: But what makes [subject] truly fascinating isn't just X. It's Y.
To understand Z, we need to go back to...
And this is just the beginning of...
structural_signposting.section_introductions: Frames what's coming as answering a question raised earlier
structural_signposting.conceptual_bridges: Explicitly connects new information to previous revelations

mystery_mechanics.revelation_timing: Builds anticipation through partial information before complete picture
mystery_mechanics.paradox_presentation: Introduces seemingly contradictory facts that demand explanation
mystery_mechanics.solution_satisfaction: Answers are more fascinating than questions suggested

comparison_and_analogy.familiar_anchors: Uses everyday objects, common technology, human experience
comparison_and_analogy.scale_comparisons: Consistently contextualizes size, strength, age against known references
comparison_and_analogy.cross_domain_connections: Links biology to engineering, physics to behavior, individual to universal
comparison_and_analogy.negative_comparisons: Frequently uses 'This isn't X, it's actually Y' structure

scientific_storytelling.evolutionary_framing: Presents adaptations as problem-solving across time
scientific_storytelling.mechanism_revelation: Shows how things work before discussing why it matters
scientific_storytelling.uncertainty_honesty: Acknowledges open questions and competing hypotheses
scientific_storytelling.implication_exploration: Connects biological facts to broader philosophical questions

language_characteristics.jargon_approach: Technical terms used accurately but defined through context
language_characteristics.metaphor_style: Grounded in physical reality rather than abstract

cinematic_qualities.visual_language: Describes scenarios with spatial and temporal specificity
cinematic_qualities.scene_setting: Creates mental images through concrete details
cinematic_qualities.zoom_technique: Shifts between macro view and microscopic detail
cinematic_qualities.montage_rhythm: Lists of examples create accumulating impact

philosophical_elevation.technique: Zooms out from specific subject to universal implications
philosophical_elevation.question_raising: Challenges assumptions about intelligence, evolution, consciousness, existence
philosophical_elevation.humility_message: Suggests human understanding is limited by human perspective

credibility_building.nuance_preservation: Presents scientific debate where it exists

viewer_transformation.journey_arc: From casual dismissal to profound respect
viewer_transformation.perception_shift: Subject transforms from simple to extraordinary
viewer_transformation.takeaway_message: Ordinary deserves deep investigation; complexity hides everywhere
viewer_transformation.lasting_effect: Viewer unable to look at subject the same way again

closing_technique.summary_avoidance: Does not recap facts already presented
closing_technique.future_orientation: Points toward ongoing research and unanswered questions
closing_technique.perspective_offer: Provides new lens for viewing subject moving forward
closing_technique.connection_to_opening: Callback that shows distance traveled from initial assumptions

authenticity_markers.personal_voice: Genuine surprise and curiosity, not performed enthusiasm
